properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v6 v6 v7 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Na na na na na na na, Na na na na na na na, Na na na na na na na na,

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There's an ember, deep within me But it's only a little flame But my faith keeps growing stronger And it won't be long till it starts a blaze

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Set my faith on fire That's my one desire Make my life a pure and holy flame So the world can see There's a fire in me Burning by the power of your name Start a blaze and set my faith, Faith on Fire

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: If you take one candle and light another And then that other does the same Before you know it the world will show it Burning bright with a holy flame

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We got a message We must share it with the world Igniting every man, woman, boy and girl

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Set my faith on fire That's my one desire Make my life a pure and holy flame So the world can see There's a fire in me Burning by the power of your name

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Start a blaze and set my faith, Faith on Fire… Faith on Fire…
